title: Broadcom Expands AI Data Center Role With New Hardware And Standards
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced its Taurus 400G/lane optical DSP and Tomahawk 6 AI switch family, expanding its AI data center hardware lineup.
